title: symplocos lancifolia var. microcarpa
intro: Symplocos lancifolia var. microcarpa, also known as the Chinese alder or var. microcarpa, is a plant species in the family Symplocaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Symplocos lancifolia var. microcarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
